name: Steamed Ginger Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Gradually fold in the dry ingredients, then milk, mixing until smooth.
5. Gently fold in the preserved ginger.
6. Spoon the mixture into a 1 1/2 quart round baking dish.
7. Cover with greased paper and tightly wrap with foil.
8. Securely tie the foil collar with string.
9. Steam for 1-3/4 hours.
10. Turn out onto a serving platter and decorate with ginger branches.
11. Serve with whipped cream or Creme Anglaise.
